name: Oracle Primavera Cloud P6 API
what_it_does: Oracle Primavera Cloud (P6) enterprise project portfolio management REST API for critical path method scheduling, resource management, and capital project controls. Enables AI agents to manage project schedule creation and CPM logic for construction and engineering scheduling automation, handle activity progress update and percent-complete tracking for automated schedule status reporting, access resource and role allocation management for capacity planning automation, retrieve earned value (EVM) calculation and performance index data for project performance monitoring, manage project baseline creation and variance analysis for schedule change control, handle risk register and Monte Carlo simulation integration for schedule risk assessment, access portfolio-level resource loading and demand planning for enterprise resource management, retrieve schedule comparison and delay analysis for claim support automation, manage project activity codes and WBS management for project classification and reporting, and integrate Primavera Cloud with ERP systems (Oracle Fusion, SAP), document management, and field execution platforms.
use_cases: Scheduling capital projects from project controls agents
Tracking EVM performance from earned value agents
Managing resource loading from capacity planning agents
Analyzing schedule delays from claims analysis agents
not_for: IT project management without complex CPM scheduling
Small construction projects under $10M without schedule complexity
Simple task management without earned value requirements
best_when: A large contractor, owner organization, or EPCM firm wanting AI agents to automate CPM schedule management, earned value tracking, resource capacity planning, schedule risk analysis, and portfolio-level project controls on major capital infrastructure, oil & gas, or defense projects.
avoid_when: CPM SCHEDULE LOGIC INTEGRITY IN AUTOMATED UPDATES: Automated activity progress updates via Primavera Cloud API must preserve CPM network logic relationships (FS, SS, FF, SF ties, lags); automated percent-complete or actual date updates without network logic validation can produce schedule float errors and incorrect critical path; require scheduler review for critical path activity automation. DCAA TIMESHEET ACCURACY FOR GOVERNMENT CONTRACTS: Automated labor cost and resource actual data from Primavera Cloud used in DCAA time reporting must reflect certified timesheet data, not planned allocation; automated government contract labor reporting from Primavera resource plans without timesheet reconciliation creates DCAA finding. BASELINE FREEZE AND CHANGE CONTROL: Automated project baseline modification or rebaselining in Primavera Cloud must go through formal change control and owner approval; automated baseline changes without approval record create schedule integrity loss and contract dispute exposure. RESOURCE LEVELING AUTOMATION APPROVAL: Automated resource leveling algorithm execution that modifies schedule dates must be reviewed by scheduler before acceptance; automated resource leveling can shift critical path activities and extend project completion without human awareness.

auth.notes: Oracle Primavera Cloud uses OAuth 2.0 with IDCS (Oracle Identity Cloud Service). REST API with JSON. Austin, Texas HQ (Oracle Corporation, NYSE: ORCL). Oracle $55B+ revenue. Primavera acquired by Oracle 2008. Primavera P6 is the global standard for capital project scheduling. Industries: construction, oil & gas, aerospace, power, government. 10,000+ project organizations globally. On-premise (P6 EPPM) and cloud (Primavera Cloud) deployment. Competes with Microsoft Project, InEight Plan, and Safran for enterprise project scheduling.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — Oracle Cloud subscription with user-based licensing
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual Oracle Cloud subscription per named user; P6 EPPM on-premise perpetual + maintenance available
pricing.notes: Austin TX. Oracle NYSE:ORCL. $55B+ revenue. Primavera acquired 2008. P6 global scheduling standard. Per-named-user Oracle Cloud subscription. On-premise perpetual license also available.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; schedule calculation and resource leveling calls are compute-intensive and throttled

known_agent_gotchas: CPM NETWORK LOGIC VALIDATION REQUIRED FOR AUTOMATED UPDATES: Automated activity progress and date updates via Primavera Cloud API must validate CPM network logic integrity; automated out-of-sequence progress (completing activities before predecessors) corrupts schedule float and critical path; implement out-of-sequence logic check before automated activity update

RESOURCE LEVELING AUTOMATION REQUIRES SCHEDULER APPROVAL: Automated execution of Primavera Cloud resource leveling algorithm modifies scheduled dates across the project network; automated leveling without scheduler review can shift critical path activities and extend project completion undetected; require scheduler sign-off before automated leveling commit

ORACLE IDCS OAUTH TOKEN MANAGEMENT: Primavera Cloud OAuth token acquisition requires Oracle IDCS tenant configuration; automated agent service account must have Primavera Cloud application role assigned in IDCS; IDCS token expiry and refresh requires proper token lifecycle management in agent authentication

P6 EPPM on-premise vs Primavera Cloud API differences — P6 EPPM on-premise uses different REST/SOAP API than Oracle Primavera Cloud SaaS; automated integrations built for P6 EPPM require rearchitecture for Primavera Cloud; verify deployment type before building automated schedule integration

Baseline version control for claim support — automated schedule updates must preserve baseline snapshots at key project milestones; automated updates without baseline preservation destroy historical schedule data needed for delay claim analysis; implement automated baseline snapshot before major progress update cycles

EVM calculation dependencies on actual cost data — Primavera Cloud EVM ACWP (actual cost) requires integration with project accounting system for labor actuals; automated EVM reporting using Primavera planned budgets without accounting actuals produces misleading CPI and SPI; ensure ERP-to-Primavera actual cost sync before automated EVM reporting
agent_readiness.security_notes: Capital project scheduling. SOC2, ISO27001, FedRAMP. OAuth2/IDCS. US/EU/APAC. Project schedule, resource, and EVM data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Capital project scheduling. SOC2, ISO27001, FedRAMP. OAuth2/IDCS. US/EU/APAC. Project schedule and earned value data.
